channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 Aave’s deposits crash after Kelp DAO hack — $15B wiped, $293M exploit reveals DeFi fragility. Can liquidity rebound or spill over? https://Blockchain.News/news/aave-deposits-drop-15b-kelp-dao-exploit #DeFi #Aave #Blockchain

item.title: CRV eyes a lethal pullback as bulls stall at $0.24 and bears hammer at $0.22. This setup screams breakdown unless buyers flood in. 🔥📉 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260422-crv-breakdown-imminent-020-target-within-10-days-prediction #CRV #CryptoNews #BTC #Markets

item.title: Mach-O Man hits macOS, Lazarus targets crypto execs via fake Zoom—steals credentials and exits in silence. 👀 https://Blockchain.News/news/lazarus-group-macos-malware-crypto-executives #Security #Crypto #Threats
